name: Rubber Wood Desk Calender Natural Wood - Threshold™: Office Supplies Desk Organizer, Brown Rubberwood, 7.5" Width
description:
Decorate your office space while keeping track of the date with the Rubber Wood Desk Calendar from Threshold™. This calendar comes with three gold-tone rings that allow for easy changing of the day and month. Made with rubberwood, this desk calendar adds practical style to your desk.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
